description: You are a Systems Librarian at a major university migrating legacy catalog records into a modern discovery interface. The Python-based ingestion script (/home/ga/workspace/marc_parser/parser.py) is dropping crucial fields, crashing on international titles, and failing to extract subfields properly due to binary parsing bugs. Fix these four bugs to accurately convert the binary MARC21 file (data/loc_sample.mrc) into the final catalog at output/parsed_catalog.json.
